tasks.subject: Task 1: 档位列表 + CUSTOMER 角色门
tasks.description:
**Goal:** GET /v1/recharge/packages 端点与 /v1/recharge/** 的 CUSTOMER 角色规则落地,recharge internal 出现真实类(删 internal marker)。

**Files:**
- Create: src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/RechargePackageRepository.kt
- Create: src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/web/RechargeController.kt
- Create: src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/web/RechargeDtos.kt
- Modify: src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/platform/security/SecurityConfig.kt
- Delete: src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/RechargeInternalMarker.kt
- Create: src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/RechargeFlowTest.kt

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- customer 票据可列上架档位(价格升序,下架不出现)
- admin 票据访问 /v1/recharge/** → 403;无票 → 401
- ./gradlew check 全绿

**Verify:** ./gradlew check → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/RechargePackageRepository.kt", "src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/web/RechargeController.kt", "src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/web/RechargeDtos.kt", "src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/platform/security/SecurityConfig.kt", "src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/RechargeInternalMarker.kt", "src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/RechargeFlowTest.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["active packages listed ascending by price", "admin token 403 on recharge routes", "check green"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: 渠道 SPI + 假渠道
tasks.description:
**Goal:** PaymentChannel SPI(raw body 验签契约)、registry(code 重复 fail-fast)、HMAC 假渠道与配置落地。

**Files:**
- Create: src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/channel/PaymentChannel.kt
- Create: src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/channel/PaymentChannelRegistry.kt
- Create: src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/channel/FakePaymentChannel.kt
- Modify: src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/AbstractIntegrationTest.kt
- Create: src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/FakePaymentChannelTest.kt

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- verifyAndParse 基于 raw body + 小写 headers,验签失败 401、解析失败 400
- Success 必带 channelOrderNo/paidCents/currency,缺字段 400;非 SUCCESS/FAILED → Ignored
- registry 重复 code fail-fast;未知 code → 400
- ./gradlew check 全绿

**Verify:** ./gradlew check → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/channel/PaymentChannel.kt", "src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/channel/PaymentChannelRegistry.kt", "src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/channel/FakePaymentChannel.kt", "src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/AbstractIntegrationTest.kt", "src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/FakePaymentChannelTest.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["raw body hmac verification with lowercase headers", "success requires channel number amount currency", "registry duplicate code fails fast", "check green"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: 两步下单 + 订单列表
tasks.description:
**Goal:** POST /v1/recharge/orders(建单 → 渠道 → CAS PROCESSING,渠道失败留 CREATED)与 keyset 订单列表,新增 PAYMENT_CHANNEL_ERROR problem。

**Files:**
- Create: src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/RechargeOrderRepository.kt
- Create: src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/RechargeService.kt
- Modify: src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/web/RechargeController.kt
- Modify: src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/web/RechargeDtos.kt
- Modify: src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/platform/web/ProblemType.kt
- Modify: src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/RechargeFlowTest.kt

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 下单快照档位三列,渠道成功后 PROCESSING + 渠道号;渠道失败留 CREATED、对外 502
- 下架/不存在档位、未知 channel → 400
- keyset 分页 + nextCursor
- ./gradlew check 全绿

**Verify:** ./gradlew check → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/RechargeOrderRepository.kt", "src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/RechargeService.kt", "src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/web/RechargeController.kt", "src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/web/RechargeDtos.kt", "src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/platform/web/ProblemType.kt", "src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/RechargeFlowTest.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["order snapshots package and reaches processing", "channel failure leaves order created with 502", "keyset paging with next cursor", "check green"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: 回调入账全链路
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 公开回调端点:验签 → 金额/渠道号校验 → inbox 去重(platform 收口)+ 宽 CAS + creditRecharge 同一事务;异常路径全部 ack + 结构化日志 + 指标。

**Files:**
- Create: src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/platform/outbox/InboxRepo.kt
- Create: src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/web/RechargeCallbackController.kt
- Create: src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/RechargePublicRoutes.kt
- Modify: src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/RechargeService.kt
- Modify: src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/RechargeOrderRepository.kt
- Create: src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/RechargeCallbackTest.kt

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 成功回调入账一次(重复/并发重复只入账一次);CREATED 直收可入账并回填渠道号
- 金额/渠道号/渠道归属错配(order.channel ≠ 路径 channel)→ ack 无副作用;终态冲突不翻案
- 渠道号回填与校验是单条条件 UPDATE(无并发绕行窗口)
- 验签失败 401、解析失败 400 不落 inbox;PENDING → 2xx 且 inbox 空
- 跨 source 命名空间不互吞(source = 1000 + channel)
- 资金用例终局 LedgerInvariants;./gradlew check 全绿

**Verify:** ./gradlew check → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/platform/outbox/InboxRepo.kt", "src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/web/RechargeCallbackController.kt", "src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/RechargePublicRoutes.kt", "src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/RechargeService.kt", "src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/recharge/internal/RechargeOrderRepository.kt", "src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/RechargeCallbackTest.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["duplicate and concurrent callbacks credit once", "channel ownership amount and channel-no mismatches ack without side effects", "reconcile is a single conditional update", "terminal conflict never flips", "cross-source dedup independent", "invariants hold and check green"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
